entries.description: Registered S1 start; read project-guidance, lessons-learned, session-set-authoring-guide, repo-worktree-layout.md, Set 067 pull_verifier.py + tool-contract.md, worktree.py, L-067-1; baseline suite 1519 passed / 1 skipped; confirmed re2 NOT installed (subprocess+timeout is the live ReDoS path).

Authored ai-assignment.md via route(task_type=analysis); recorded routed next-orch rec for S2 (switch to sonnet-class for the analysis-heavy re-grade, with the statistical-rigor caveat for the operator). Routed cost $0.0056.

Finalized run-test-contract.md: disposable-detached-worktree lifecycle, bounded operator-authored command surface, raw result shape, caps, and the precise (re-scoped) disposable-CWD isolation scope (NOT an OS sandbox).

Implemented ai_router/run_test_sandbox.py: run_subprocess_capped (shell=False, hard wall-clock kill of the process tree, temp-file-bounded output cap + raw elision), run_test_in_cage (git worktree add --detach -> run write-confined cwd -> crash-safe finally teardown with prune --expire now + registration leak check), run_test_caps_from_config.

Relocated grep ReDoS defense onto the cage machinery: new ai_router/regex_worker.py (subprocess, re2-inline fast path else killable subprocess) via isolated_regex_search; pull_verifier._canonical_grep now delegates the regex EVALUATION (walk+confinement stay), the 0.21.1 nesting heuristic demoted to a cheap pre-filter.

Wired run_test into pull_verifier: RunTestConfig + _run_test_tool_schema + _dispatch_run_test; offered ONLY when run_test_config passed (default loop byte-for-byte the Set 067 read-only set); dispatched to the cage OUTSIDE the byte-equality guard, recorded as a real probe. Added run_test caps block to router-config.yaml + exports from __init__.py.

Added ai_router/tests/test_run_test_sandbox.py (cage lifecycle, timeout-kill, output cap, write-confinement, teardown-on-exception + leak surfacing, caps-from-config, ReDoS isolation, worker) + 4 run_test wiring tests in test_pull_verifier.py.

Cross-provider verification gpt-5.4 (high): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Critical write-confinement overclaim re-scoped per L-064-8; 1 Major teardown prune-order+leak-surfacing; 1 Minor elision partial-line; ALSO fixed a latent Windows  multi-match grep bug found writing the Minor test) -> R2 ISSUES_FOUND (Critical re-scope echoes missed per L-065-1; Major prune --expire now; new Minor leak-render dropped raw output) -> R3 VERIFIED. ~$0.436.
